title: isometrum glandulosa
intro: Isometrum glandulosa, also known as the glandular isometrum, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southeastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Isometrum glandulosa include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use as an anti-fever remedy. Isometrum glandulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants in traditional Asian medicine.
